title: OPERATION SAUCER #5 [Operação Prato]  reports n.041 to n.050 [1977]

SHAPE: Undefined (in sight) 07. APPARENT SIZE: 2 and 3 cm, respectively 08. MOVEMENT: Element A: Straight path. Element B: Irregular (curve) 09. […]
text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 041

- 02. PLACE: Baía do Sol – Mosqueiro-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 22 Nov 77 – at 05:18 hours

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Light bodies (2)

- 05. COLOR: Matte yellow

- 06. SHAPE: Undefined (in sight)

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: 2 and 3 cm, respectively

- 08. MOVEMENT: Element A: Straight path. Element B: Irregular (curve)

- 09. SPEED: Low (200 km / h), sometimes with constant acceleration peaks.

- 10. ALTITUDE: 1.500 m (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 1,500 m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): 1S Q.AT MT FLÁVIO and the civilians UBIRATAN PINON FRIAS, Mrs. F.M. FREITAS COSTA and Ms. CELIA MONTENEGR
summary: Operação Prato reports 041–050: ten sightings Nov 1977 in Pará; report 042 records oval metallic object seen from a Cessna 206; report 050 notes UFO directing a blue beam in multiple directions.
